disposition.four_band_base: The EA's revised pre-implementation summary (192 cases across 4 bands: 512, 1024, 2048, 4096) is APPROVED as submitted. All requirements R-1 through R-4 from scope amendment v1.0 are satisfied. No revisions needed for the 4-band base corpus.
disposition.upper_band_tier:
Scope amendment v1.2 adds a 28-case upper-band supplemental tier at bands 8192 and 12288. This is a Lead Architect directive based on the following findings:
1. ADR-012 locks max context at 16,384 tokens with ~12,288 input budget. The 4-band corpus covers only 4,096 tokens — less than one-third of the production input range.
2. At 8K, speculative decoding is still active (AR≈0.58, NAT=3 wins). At 12K, spec-decode is marginal (AR→0, NAT=1 is 61% faster). These inflection points must be covered.
3. Attention dilution at longer contexts could cause the LLM to miss policy-critical signals — especially A-T5 exfiltration destinations buried in 8K/12K padding noise. This is the primary threat scenario.
The EA must provide a compact addendum (NOT a full Section 4 re-review) covering only the 28 upper-band cases.

section.name: Upper-Band Addendum
section.instruction:
For each of the 2 new bands (8192, 12288), provide:
1. A table listing each slot with: category, pattern/type, ground truth. Follow the composition specified in Task4.12_SCOPE_AMENDMENT.xml v1.2 upper_band_tier section exactly.
2. At least 1 example case sketch per band (2 minimum total). A-T5 sketches preferred — demonstrate exfil destinations buried in long-context padding.
3. Confirmation that the padding function can reach 8K and 12K targets. The existing filler_chunks cycle (6 chunks × ~50-80 tokens each ≈ 300-480 tokens per cycle) will need ~15 cycles for 8K and ~25 cycles for 12K. The chunk_idx limit of 500 is sufficient. State this.
4. BAND_TARGETS entries for the harness: 8192: (7370, 8960) — ±10% of 8192 12288: (11060, 13440) — ±10% of 12288

section.name: Updated Summary Counts
section.instruction: Update the summary counts table and band distribution table to reflect: - Grand total: 220 (40 original + 152 base + 28 upper-band) - New LLM-path: 172 (144 base + 28 upper-band; all upper-band cases are LLM-path) - 6 bands total: 45 / 48 / 50 / 49 / 14 / 14 - Total iterations: 220 × 3 = 660 - Total generate() calls: 479 (base) + 84 (upper-band) + 2 (warmup) = 565

section.name: Updated Runtime Estimate
section.instruction: Provide revised runtime estimate incorporating upper-band latency. Use Task 4.3 NAT sweep evidence for 8K/12K per-call times: - 8K band: ~8,000 ms/call (TTFT ~27s amortized across PA's max_new_tokens=10) - 12K band: ~18,000 ms/call (extrapolated) Expected total: ~33–36 minutes. Confirm this is acceptable for a single-session quality gate run.

not_required.item: Sections 1–3, 5–7 of the pre-implementation summary (already approved).
The 4-band base corpus (192 cases) — already approved in full.
Category C (Rule 4 prefilter) cases at upper bands — deterministic regex is context-length-independent; excluded from upper-band tier by design.
Full re-review of any previously submitted material.

attachment.note: Read the new upper_band_tier section in full.
Execution prompt — constraints K-1..K-7, measurements M-1..M-8 still apply.
Current 40-case harness. Note pad_content_to_target() and BAND_TARGETS dict.
DeterministicPolicyChecker.check() — verify all upper-band cases bypass to None.

execution_process.step: EA submits upper-band addendum + updated counts/runtime.
Lead Architect reviews (expected: brief, targeted review).
Upon approval, EA creates branch feature/p5-task4-12-corpus-hardening from main HEAD (0d4a137).
EA implements all 220 cases per Task4.12_v1.xml execution steps.
EA adds BAND_TARGETS entries for 8192 and 12288 in the harness.
EA runs the full harness, captures evidence, commits.
